positiveText: A sophisticated, high-definition refinement of the reference illustration. Strictly maintain the 2D aesthetic and stylized nature; avoid any transition into 3D, CGI, or photorealism. Focus on elevating the intricacy of the linework, making every stroke crisp and deliberate. Enhance the visual density by adding sophisticated hatching and cross-hatching line-work within the existing shapes, but do so in moderation. Do not introduce organic, botanical, or noise-based textures into any region. The goal is a "Masterpiece Edition" of the original artwork, where the detail is increased through artistic complexity and cleaner execution while preserving the flat, hand-drawn soul.
